---
title: "useNodeEffects.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/logic/useNodeEffects.ts"
loc: 52
complexity: 18
logic_score: 2.95
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 5.85
overall_score: 3.92
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `useNodeEffects`
- `useNodeEffects`
- `getVisScale`
- `getStarColor`
- `p`
- `calculateEffect`
- `activeNodeId`
- `isNeighbor`
- `sId`
- `tId`
- `targetId`
- `scale`
- `isHovered`
- `isSelected`
- `color`
- `nodeMatrix`
- `gungnirScore`
- `complexity`
- `detail`
